name: Sweet and Sour Halibut
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, halved and seeded
1 green bell pepper, halved and seeded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill to medium heat.
2. When ready to cook, spray the rack—off the grill—with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a nonaluminum pan or large shallow bowl, combine the brown sugar, 1/4 cup water, the vinegar, ketchup, soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
4. Measure out 1/4 cup of the mixture and set aside.
5. Add the halibut to the remaining mixture in the pan, turning to coat.
6. Grill the bell pepper halves, cut-sides up, for 5 minutes, or until the skin is blackened. When cool enough to handle, peel the peppers and cut them into thin strips.
7. Grill the halibut, uncovered, turning once, for 5 minutes or until the halibut is just opaque.
8. Place the halibut on plates, top with the reserved brown sugar mixture, bell pepper strips, and scallions, and serve.
